items.title: The PWL-T-Rex is online!
items.summary: I just published my open source framework PWL-T-Rex on GitHub. Using this framework, you can reformulate MINLPs to MIP relaxations and approximations using different reformulation…
items.content_html: I just published my open source framework PWL-T-Rex on GitHub. Using this framework, you can reformulate MINLPs to MIP relaxations and approximations using different reformulation techniques. Find more information on my GitHub or directly on this website: PWL-T-Rex
